scripts.db:local:status: node scripts/run-with-db-env.mjs local npx prisma migrate status
scripts.db:local:deploy: node scripts/run-with-db-env.mjs local npx prisma migrate deploy
scripts.db:local:push: node scripts/run-with-db-env.mjs local npx prisma db push
scripts.db:local:migrate: node scripts/run-with-db-env.mjs local npx prisma migrate dev
scripts.db:prod:status: node scripts/run-with-db-env.mjs production npx prisma migrate status
scripts.db:prod:deploy: node scripts/run-with-db-env.mjs production npx prisma migrate deploy
